title: SiTime Reports Q3 2025 Financial Results - Continued Strong Growth
text: SiTime reported Q3 2025 financial results showing continued strong growth momentum. The company's focus on AI data center and high-performance computing markets continued to drive results. During the quarter, the company made progress on the Renesas timing business integration, which was expected to significantly enhance SiTime's market position in global timing solutions. The combination of SiTime's advanced MEMS technology and Renesas' traditional oscillator business created a comprehensive timing platform serving diverse market segments. SiTime's strategic positioning as a key enabler of AI infrastructure was validated through strong design wins and customer engagement.
